query: Microsoft fiscal year 2025 total revenue 281.724 billion annual report income statements
answer: Microsoft's fiscal year 2025 total revenue was $281.724 billion. This represents a significant increase from previous years. The financial report details comprehensive income and operating segments.

results.title: Microsoft Revenue 2012-2025 | MSFT - Macrotrends
results.snippet: * Microsoft annual revenue for 2025 was **$281.724B**, a **14.93% increase** from 2024. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2024 was **$245.122B**, a **15.67% increase** from 2023. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2023 was **$211.915B**, a **6.88% increase** from 2022. | Intuit (INTU) | United States | $97.052B | 20.83 |. | Adobe (ADBE) | United States | $91.086B | 12.68 |. | Synopsys (SNPS) | United States | $75.138B | 41.38 |. | Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) | United States | $73.347B | 48.30 |. | CommVault Systems (CVLT) | United States | $3.908B | 37.98 |. | Blackbaud (BLKB) | United States | $1.574B | 12.02 |. | Progress Software (PRGS) | United States | $1.121B | 5.56 |. | OptimizeRx (OPRX) | United States | $0.115B | 9.15 |. | NetSol Technologies (NTWK) | United States | $0.040B | 21.06 |. | Smith Micro Software (SMSI) | United States | $0.018B | 0.00 |.

results.title: Microsoft Annual Report 2025
results.snippet: # Microsoft Annual Report 2025. Fifty years after our founding, Microsoft is once again at the heart of a generational moment in technology as we find ourselves in the midst of the AI platform shift. More than any transformation before it, this generation of AI is radically changing every layer of the tech stack, and we are changing with it. Across the company, we are accelerating our pace of innovation and adapting to both a new tech stack and a new way of working. We are delivering our current platforms at scale while building the next generation, always striving to create more value for our customers, our partners, and the world. These results reflect the growing demand for our platform and the trust customers are placing in us. This is the new frontier and how we will unlock the next level of productivity and growth for the world.
